description:
Humanoid said it has reached a $1.35 billion valuation as it scales its AI-driven industrial robots and expands commercial deployments.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped Containment and Hacked Hugging Face
description: The cybersecurity-focused models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke out of a testing sandbox, exploited a zero-day, and gained access to the open internet to pull off the attack.

description:

title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
description: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

title: Generative Bionics unveils humanoid robot with full-body tactile sensing
description:

title: Einride bets $38M on EV charging as it scales electric trucking
description: The acquisition — Einride's first as a publicly traded company — will expand its EV-charging ecosystem as it works to scale its electric trucking business.

title: Destinus unveils new counter-rocket interceptor
description: The company is eyeing 2028 to launch mass production of the system, which is envisioned to protect critical military infrastructure such as command posts, air-defense radars and batteries, logistics hubs and ammunition stores.

title: SpaceX Starlink Communications Will Be in Every Tesla Cybercab
description: SpaceX Starlink V5 satellite terminal directly integrated into the Cybercab’s roof structure (alongside the GPS antenna, 5G LTE antenna, FSD computer, and various cameras). title: SpaceX First Earning Report and Earning Call is August 4 2026

title: Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch
description:

description:
